title: Flask app serving custom CSS from assets folder

content.problemStatement:
In this practice problem, you'll create a Flask application that serves custom CSS files from the default 'assets' folder. You'll set up a route to display a simple HTML page that uses the custom CSS file.

### Task:

1. Declare the flask app with the `assest` folder as static folder.

2. Include the `styles.css` in the `index.html` file from the `static` folder.
